title: Fix VlProcess argument breaks DPI export

features.name: dpi export function with verilator-inserted vlprocess argument
features.description: Code should include a DPI export function declaration with export "DPI" directive that is called from Verilator's VlProcess-aware generated code, where Verilator inserts a VlProcess argument but generates incorrect call code passing symsp() instead of VlProcessRef
features.snippet:
export "DPI" function uvm_report_dpi;
import "DPI" function int uvm_report_dpi(int severity, string id, string message, int verbosity, string filename, int line);

features.name: dpi export wrapper with scope symbol pointer type mismatch
features.description: Code should include a DPI export wrapper where Verilator generates a call passing __Vscopep->symsp() (returning Syms*) to a function expecting VlProcessRef as first argument
features.snippet: (*__Vcb)((Vt_uvm_todo__Syms*)(__Vscopep->symsp()), severity__Vcvt, id__Vcvt, message__Vcvt, verbosity__Vcvt, filename__Vcvt, line__Vcvt);
